hooks.command: bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; if echo "$f" | grep -q "backend/"; then cd /sessions/bold-stoic-wright/mnt/Consulting_app && make test-backend 2>&1 | tail -30; elif echo "$f" | grep -q "repo-b/"; then cd /sessions/bold-stoic-wright/mnt/Consulting_app && make test-frontend 2>&1 | tail -30; fi'
